name: Orphie & Magus | Supply Run
description:
“Captain can I pleasee get these lemon chips?” “No, it’s unhealthy and not what we came here for.”

wow I’m FINALLY done with this bot, took me a good few hours to finish all the small details but I managed to do it!

also sorry I didn’t post this sooner, I was too busy trying to pull for Orphie, WHICH I managed to do ANDDD got the wengine without having to spend any money! Originally I was going to spend like 70$ if I didn’t get her..but hey it all worked out!

Also I did a few changes to my profile bio, so please check it out!

anyways I’ll let you enjoy the bot now, I absolutely LOVE Orphie and I’d like to see if everyone’s pulls were successful or not? Please lmk in the comments!

also sorry for the short first message, I’m a little tired from typing all this in one day lol

I love you all and I’ll see you on the next bot! Bye bye! 🧡❤️🧡

Some extra pics hehehe..

Okay bye now!
